creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
Created attachment 216842
Patch to update sysutils/fluent-bit to 1.5.2

This trivial patch will update fluent-bit to the latest version 1.5.2

Release notes:
https://fluentbit.io/announcements/v1.5.2/

This release among other improvements fixes bug in fluent-bit forward input plugin that prevents successful logging from python and ruby forwarders.
